channel.title: Back-a-Truck on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Back-a-Truck on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Back-a-Truck — April 11, 2026
item.description: This week's Back-a-Truck: things overheard at Stabroek Market, on East Bank, at the seawall, and from somebody cousin who know somebody who work near a building.

item.title: Back-A-Truck — March 24, 2026: This Week's Deals and Market Finds
item.description: Your weekly guide to what's moving, what's worth buying, and what the market is saying this week in Guyana.

item.title: Back-A-Truck — March 19, 2026
item.description: Guyana's most fictional classifieds. Items for sale, wanted, and otherwise negotiable.

item.title: 🚛 Back-a-Truck — Saturday, February 7, 2026
item.description: De people’s marketplace! Fictional buy, sell, trade, and barter from all corners of Guyana. Back-a-truck and come see wha we got!

item.title: 🚛 Back-a-Truck – Saturday, January 31, 2026
item.description: De people's marketplace! Fictional buy, sell, trade, and barter from all corners of Guyana. Back-a-truck and come see wha we got!

item.title: 📸 Back-a-Truck: Weekend Deals - January 24, 2026
item.description: Yuh weekend guide to de best deals in de markets! From Stabroek to Bourda, we got de prices and de vibes!

item.title: 📸 Back-a-Truck: This Week's Wildest Sightings
item.description: You can't make dis up! The most absurd, hilarious, and head-scratching sightings from around Guyana this week.

item.title: 📸 Back-a-Truck: Wha We Spot Dis Week
item.description: Absurd tings spotted around Guyana dis week. You can't make dis up!
